bead.title: update sessions redirect coverage and screenshot baselines
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The current e2e suite still treats `/sessions` as a standalone page, but the frontend has already shifted sessions into the run-layer experience. `cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/sessions/+page.ts` redirects to `/runs?layer=run`, and the fallback Svelte page says the same. That redirect contract is breaking `app.spec.ts` TC-005, `sessions.spec.ts`, and several screenshot fixtures that still assume the old standalone Sessions page.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
- `cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/sessions/+page.ts:1-10` redirects sessions into runs.
- `cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/sessions/+page.svelte:1-7` documents the redirect fallback.
- `cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/sessions.spec.ts:107-289` still exercises the old standalone sessions contract.
- `cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/screenshots.spec.ts:133-137` still snapshots the old sessions-driven pages, including the agent / project-overview / efficacy coverage that is currently failing.

PROPOSED FIX
Bring the sessions e2e coverage and the screenshot baselines up to the current run-layer redirect contract. Update the tests to assert the redirect into runs, the run-layer session expansion, and any screenshot baselines that changed because sessions are now surfaced in runs. Keep the fix within the frontend/e2e tree and the sessions route files.

NON-SCOPE
- The documents/beads fixture regressions from app.spec.
- The 2k scale fixture bead.
- The broader Store API migration.

ACCEPTANCE
1. `cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/sessions.spec.ts` passes against the current redirect contract.
2. `cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/screenshots.spec.ts` passes for the affected pages.
3. `cd cli && bun run test:e2e -- --grep "TC-005|screenshots"` passes.
4. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
